study_1_controlled_evaluation.scenario_note: Expanded scenarios are deterministic controlled variants and are not claimed to be independent production incidents.

study_2_pm_prompt_evaluation.evaluation_note: Prompts are curated governance-oriented prompts and are not claimed to represent all project manager communication patterns.

study_2b_grounded_llm_explanation_evalua.constraint: The LLM receives structured AAF outputs and is not permitted to modify selected actions or introduce new evidence.

study_3_telemetry_pilot.evaluation_note: The telemetry pilot demonstrates feasibility under controlled conditions and is not production-scale validation.

statistical_reporting.interpretation_note: Confidence intervals are descriptive uncertainty estimates for the controlled evaluation set and should not be interpreted as production-scale generalization claims.
